entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: Tools used for genetic characterization and identification of loci controlling traits of economic importance

entities.name: GENETIC CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of identifying the genetic makeup of an organism using molecular markers

entities.name: LOCI
entities.description: Specific positions on a chromosome that control traits of economic importance

entities.name: TRAITS OF ECONOMIC IMPORTANCE
entities.description: Characteristics of crops that provide economic value and are targets for selection

entities.name: CROP SPECIES
entities.description: Plants subjected to genetic characterization and improvement

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The overall process of enhancing crop characteristics for better yield or quality

entities.name: INDIRECT SELECTION
entities.description: The use of molecular markers as tools to select for desired traits

entities.name: MONOGENIC INHERITANCE
entities.description: Inheritance of a trait controlled by a single gene, making it easier for marker-assisted selection

entities.name: MARKER ASSAYS
entities.description: Tests used to detect the presence of specific molecular markers

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method that uses molecular markers to select for desired traits

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where the implementation of marker-assisted selection faces resource and capacity constraints

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISMS
entities.description: A type of molecular marker consisting of a single base pair change in the DNA sequence

entities.name: ASSAY PROTOCOLS
entities.description: The specific procedures used to conduct marker assays

entities.name: ASSAY PLATFORMS
entities.description: The infrastructure and equipment required to perform marker assays

entities.name: COMPUTATIONAL CAPACITY
entities.description: The computing power required for processing and analyzing marker data

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGY RESEARCH
entities.description: Scientific research involving the application of biotechnology to crops

entities.name: PROPRIETARY RIGHTS
entities.description: Legal rights over biotechnology products and processes that may limit access

entities.name: RESOURCE-POOR FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers with limited resources who are the intended beneficiaries of crop improvement

entities.name: NATIONAL PUBLIC AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH ORGANIZATIONS
entities.description: Institutions responsible for integrating biotechnology tools into national research efforts

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGY TOOLS
entities.description: Tools and processes used in biotechnology for crop improvement
